name: Quadriceps

landmarks.notes: High per-set systemic fatigue on squats limits recoverable volume relative to smaller muscles. Estimate only.

frequency_notes: ~2x/week; balance heavy squats against higher-rep machine work to manage fatigue.
training_notes: Squat to depth for loaded stretch; leg extensions isolate and train the rectus femoris best when the hip is extended. Deep-range work is high-yield.
